definitions: An extremely rude and aggressive way to tell someone to go away or to express contempt and rejection of their ideas or presence.
Used to dismiss something or someone with great anger and disrespect.
examples: When he tried to give me unsolicited advice, I just wanted to tell him to shove it up your ass.
They told me to shove it up your ass when I suggested a new plan.
I'm not interested in your opinion, you can shove it up your ass.
